seoTitle: Kemmis vs Kenmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kemmis and Kenmore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kemmis and Kenmore.
heading: Kemmis vs Kenmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kemmis, Queensland and Kenmore, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kemmis has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kenmore (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kemmis or Kenmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kemmis has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Kenmore scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kemmis scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Kenmore scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kemmis or Kenmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kemmis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
